title: The AI agent showdown begins
author: Zain Kahn October
text:
- Superhuman AI
- Posts
- The AI agent showdown begins
The AI agent showdown begins
ALSO: Chatting with the CEO of Afforai
Read time: under 4 minutes
Remember, remember the beginning of November. Microsoft is telling its clients (and the world) to mark their calendars for the arrival of customizable AI agents, which could transform how we do work.
🎧️ New podcast: How 2 college students built a 7-figure AI app. Listen now on Apple, Spotify, and YouTube.
Today’s Insights
Today in AI: Blade Runner, Apple, and an API
Microsoft Unveils Autonomous AI Agents
Everything else you should know today
5 new AI tools to boost your productivity
AI-Generated Images: Soundscapes
TODAY IN AI
Source: X/Tesla
More trouble for Perplexity: After getting the book thrown at them by the NYTimes, AI search startup Perplexity has now been accused by News Corp (which owns WSJ and NY Post) of copyright infringement and reproducing content without permission.
No running from this: “Blade Runner 2049” production company Alcon Entertainment sued Elon Musk for allegedly using AI-generated imagery resembling scenes from the film to promote Tesla's new robotaxi, despite being denied permission to do so.
Musk’s API is here: In better news for Musk, his startup xAI has finally released an API for its flagship Grok generative AI model, which powers various features on X. Many had been waiting for the release since August, and some users claim the API is currently quite basic and appears to only have a single model available “grok-beta.”
PRESENTED BY AE STUDIO
The agency building million-user apps and AI-powered tools
Millions of users, one live event, and an app that just... works.
That's what AE Studio pulled off for Eurovision Latinoamérica. They said, "Build us an app for millions of live users." We said, "Hold our coffee." ☕
Here's the thing: Killer apps aren't just about code. They're about getting inside users' heads and designing experiences that delight.
That's where we shine. 👋 We turn "Wouldn't it be cool if..." into "Oh, it actually exists!"
Got a wild idea? Need a wild idea? Either way, we're your people. Let's chat and cook up some digital magic.
🎧️ DECODING THE FUTURE
How 2 college students built a 7 figure app
Alec Nguyen is the co-founder and CEO of Afforai, an AI-powered reference manager for academics. He started Afforai as a college project and grew it to $700,000 in revenue within three months of monetization. Previously, Alec worked as a student tutor in economics, data science, and computer science.
In our conversation, we discuss:
How Alec turned a student project into a successful startup
The journey from MVP to product-market fit
Strategies for successful product launches and growth hacking
The challenges of being an international student founder
Insights on bootstrapping vs. raising venture capital
FROM THE FRONTIER
Build Your Own AI: Microsoft introduces autonomous agents in Copilot Studio
Source: Microsoft
Microsoft has made a bold move in the AI race by unveiling its new AI agents designed to work autonomously and scale teams without needing explicit human input. Jared Spataro, CMO for Microsoft’s AI at Work wants us to “think of agents as the new apps for an AI-powered world.” These particular ones aim to complete tasks autonomously in areas including sales, service, finance, and supply chain operations.
The best part: users can build their own autonomous agents in Copilot Studio starting in November. Microsoft’s move – which could set a new standard in AI for businesses and individuals - comes days before competitor Salesforce is set to launch its own version of autonomous AI tech for sales and service, Agentforce.
PRESENTED BY METAVIEW
Collaborate with AI to generate and refine interview questions
Metaview has launched hiring studio — a free suite of copilots to help 10x the productivity of recruiting teams. With hiring studio, Metaview has fine-tuned an LLM to:
Collaborate with AI to design interview questions tailored to your recruiting.
Automatically create a rubric for what to look for in an excellent, good, or bad answer.
Listen to sample candidate answers in formats like STAR.
Export or share the questions with the rest of your team.
PROMPT OF THE DAY
Got Leftovers?
Prompt: I have <how much of leftover> leftover <type of food> from <meal or occasion>, and I’m not sure what to do with it. Please suggest some ideas or recipes to help me use them and reduce food waste.
Source: Upbase
PRODUCTIVITY
5 AI Tools to Supercharge Your Productivity
✅ Feta: An AI platform that helps product and engineering teams run efficient meetings and document discussions for actionable insights.
✅ Focus Buddy: An AI co-pilot that stays on call with you to manage your to-do list, help avoid procrastination, and find the behavioral patterns that are holding you back.
✅ Patterned AI: Generate unique patterns for your product with the help of AI.
✅ Convo: An AI-moderated and analyzed qualitative user research platform that gives the depth of interviews at the scale of surveys.
✅ Strella: A research platform that uses AI-moderated interviews and instant synthesis, powering smarter and faster decisions.
☁️ Join us for Startup School: Gen AI*, back by popular demand October 29, 2024 - November 21, 2024. You can learn the fundamentals of generative AI and how to apply the latest AI solutions to your business with this immersive, hands-on training series, led by experts and partners.
* indicates a promoted tool, if any
AI & TECH NEWS
Everything else you need to know today
🔮 In a daze: New AI-enhanced messaging app Daze is all the rage with Gen-Z and already has 48 million views and 156,000 waitlist sign-ups ahead of its November 4th launch.
📚️ Book Bans: Penguin Random House is adding a warning to its books' copyright pages, stating that their content can’t be used to train AI systems.
💼 AI Analyst: A new study from the MIT Technology Review shows that 94% of business leaders now rely on generative AI to help develop new software.

Superhuman is the world’s biggest AI newsletter for businesses and professionals with 800,000+ readers and 1.5 Million followers on socials working at the world’s leading startups and enterprises. Companies like Amazon, Hubspot, and Salesforce feature their products in Superhuman. You can learn more about partnering with us here.
🧞Your wish is my command
What did you think of today's email?Your feedback helps me create better emails for you! |
Got more feedback or just want to get in touch? Reply to this email and we’ll get back to you.
Thanks for reading.
Until next time!
Zain & the Superhuman AI team
